task: Fix Gemini schema crash on exclusiveMinimum/exclusiveMaximum properties
error: [GoogleGenerativeAI Error]: Error fetching from https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/...: [400 Bad Request] Invalid JSON payload received. Unknown name 'exclusiveMaximum' / 'exclusiveMinimum'
resolution: Added a `sanitizeGeminiSchema` function to recursively strip `exclusiveMinimum` and `exclusiveMaximum` properties from all dynamically registered MCP tool parameters prior to calling LangChain's `bindTools` in `src/nodes/executionNodes.ts`.
non_obvious_patterns: Unlike standard OpenAI bindings, the Gemini FunctionDeclaration schema doesn't seem to currently support numeric range limiters like `exclusiveMinimum` and `exclusiveMaximum`. Since third-party MCP servers routinely define these properties on their exported tools, they cause silent execution termination if passed untrimmed.
skill_correction: When mapping external schemas (like standard JSON-schema-compliant tools from MCP) into Gemini, always recursively trim unsupported fields like `exclusiveMinimum` and `exclusiveMaximum` out of the schema.
